metadata.title: General Listings Marketplace Data Assets
metadata.description: Key business data assets, stores, and governance anchors for the General Listings Marketplace domain.

assets.name: Listing
assets.description: A seller-created marketplace offer with lifecycle, visibility, and transaction state.
assets.businessMeaning: Core unit of supply and buyer discovery.

interfaces.name: listing api
interfaces.description: Transactional and retrieval access to listing lifecycle.

interfaces.name: listing-changed
interfaces.description: Event emitted when listing state changes.

assets.name: Listing Media
assets.description: Images, videos, renditions, and moderation metadata attached to listings.
assets.businessMeaning: Visual proof and merchandising content for listings.

interfaces.name: media api
interfaces.description: Access to original and transformed listing media.

governance.retention: lifecycle aligned with listing retention policy

assets.name: Seller Entity
assets.description: Professional seller, dealer, or storefront master identity, permissions, and structure.
assets.businessMeaning: Canonical commercial identity for professional supply participants.

interfaces.name: merchant master api
interfaces.description: Canonical access to professional seller entities.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved seller-facing flows only

assets.name: Saved Search
assets.description: Persisted buyer intent, filters, and alert preferences.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable demand intent that drives repeat visits and alerts.

interfaces.name: saved search api
interfaces.description: Create and update saved intent and alerts.

governance.retention: until user deletion or inactivity threshold

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account profile, preferences, account state, and marketplace identity attributes for buyers and casual sellers.
assets.businessMeaning: Primary PII-bearing customer record used across account and engagement flows.

interfaces.name: customer profile api
interfaces.description: Access to customer account profile and preference state.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved customer-facing flows only

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email addresses, phone numbers, and contactability state for customers.
assets.businessMeaning: Contact channel inventory used for messaging, alerts, recovery, and trust workflows.

interfaces.name: contact point api
interfaces.description: Read and update verified contact channels.

governance.retention: account lifecycle plus communication retention policy

assets.name: Conversation Thread
assets.description: Buyer-seller message threads, delivery state, and moderation context.
assets.businessMeaning: Core communications record for transaction coordination and support.

interfaces.name: messaging api
interfaces.description: Read and write conversation state.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal support, trust, and direct participants only

assets.name: Notification
assets.description: Notification payloads, delivery state, and preference-aware routing metadata.
assets.businessMeaning: Outbound communication record used to close loops with buyers and sellers.

interfaces.name: notification-dispatch
interfaces.description: Delivery-ready notification feed.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Consent decisions, legal basis, notice versions, timestamps, and revocation state for user tracking and communications.
assets.businessMeaning: Auditable privacy and communication consent history.
assets.accessScope: privacy operations and consent-aware product flows

interfaces.name: consent api
interfaces.description: Read and evaluate consent and privacy preference state.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential references, verification factors, password hashes, and authentication material metadata.
assets.businessMeaning: Authentication anchor for customer and operator identity flows.

interfaces.name: credential validation api
interfaces.description: Internal-only access for authentication and credential checks.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Issued session state, refresh tokens, device-bound session metadata, and revocation status.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated access state across user sessions.

interfaces.name: session api
interfaces.description: Issue, validate, and revoke runtime sessions.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, account restrictions, and trust policy decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Policy layer controlling who can do what under which trust conditions.

interfaces.name: authorization policy api
interfaces.description: Resolve authorization and entitlement decisions.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance-relevant audit trail for identity, privacy, trust, and payment actions.
assets.businessMeaning: Forensic and compliance evidence for sensitive operations.
assets.accessScope: security, audit, and compliance operations only

interfaces.name: audit event stream
interfaces.description: Immutable or append-only audit event feed.

assets.name: Identity Verification Record
assets.description: Verification cases, evidence metadata, match outcomes, and certification status for actor identity checks.
assets.businessMeaning: Proof and status of identity verification workflows.

interfaces.name: identity verification api
interfaces.description: Track and retrieve verification status and case outcomes.

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial order, reservation, or settlement-ready marketplace transaction state.
assets.businessMeaning: Canonical transaction state used by protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: transaction api
interfaces.description: Read and write transaction state for commerce flows.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment instrument references, wallet links, and payment method eligibility state.
assets.businessMeaning: Payment method binding used without exposing raw card or bank credentials in product flows.
assets.accessScope: payments and protected checkout flows only

interfaces.name: payment instrument token api
interfaces.description: Internal access to tokenized payment method references.

assets.name: Payment Ledger
assets.description: Financial postings, settlement results, reconciliation, and ledger events.
assets.businessMeaning: Auditable financial trail for payment operations.

interfaces.name: ledger-posted
interfaces.description: Ledger and settlement event stream.

governance.sharingPolicy: finance, audit, and approved processors only

assets.name: Geo Reference
assets.description: Normalized addresses, geocodes, boundaries, and distance models used across marketplace flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Shared geographic reference used for local discovery and logistics decisions.

interfaces.name: geo reference api
interfaces.description: Lookup and normalization of geographic data.

assets.name: Trust Signal
assets.description: Marketplace trust, reputation, and fraud indicators attached to actors and listings.
assets.businessMeaning: Shared signal layer for safer discovery, messaging, and commerce decisions.

interfaces.name: trust signal api
interfaces.description: Access to actor and listing trust indicators.

governance.retention: safety and fraud operations retention window
governance.sharingPolicy: internal trust and approved customer-facing flows only

assets.name: Search Query Event
assets.description: Search intent, filter usage, and ranking interaction telemetry from buyer discovery flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Behavioral signal used to improve ranking, growth loops, and saved alert quality.

interfaces.name: search telemetry stream
interfaces.description: Discovery telemetry feed for analytics and tuning.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal analytics and ranking consumers only

stores.name: Listing OLTP Store
stores.description: Primary transactional persistence for listing lifecycle and visibility state.

stores.name: Listing Search Index
stores.description: Search-optimized listing projection used for retrieval and ranking.

stores.name: Media Blob Store
stores.description: Durable object storage for listing media originals and renditions.

stores.name: Merchant Master DB
stores.description: Canonical persistence for seller, dealer, and storefront entities.

stores.name: Saved Search Store
stores.description: Persistence for buyer alert definitions and stored search intent.

stores.name: Customer Profile DB
stores.description: Primary persistence for customer account profile, preferences, and contactability state.

stores.name: Messaging Store
stores.description: Conversation and messaging persistence used by buyer-seller communication flows.

stores.name: Notification Outbox
stores.description: Delivery-ready notification queue and dispatch state.

stores.name: Consent Ledger DB
stores.description: Auditable persistence for privacy and communication consent history.

stores.name: Identity Credential Store
stores.description: Highly restricted store for credential metadata and authentication factors.

stores.name: Session Store
stores.description: Short-lived runtime persistence for issued sessions and revocation state.

stores.name: Access Policy Store
stores.description: Authoritative policy and entitlement state for authorization decisions.

stores.name: Audit Log Store
stores.description: Append-only storage and stream for security and compliance audit events.

stores.name: Transaction Store
stores.description: Canonical transaction state for protected commerce flows.

stores.name: Payment Ledger DB
stores.description: Financial postings, settlements, and reconciliation records.

stores.name: Verification Case Store
stores.description: Restricted persistence for identity verification cases and evidence metadata.

stores.name: Payment Instrument Vault
stores.description: Vault or token store for payment instrument references and payment method tokens.

stores.name: Geo Reference Store
stores.description: Canonical geographic reference data used by local marketplace flows.

stores.name: Trust Signal Store
stores.description: Persistent risk, trust, and reputation signals for actors and listings.

stores.name: Search Telemetry Stream
stores.description: Event stream carrying search and ranking interaction telemetry.
